search_queue.Search Task: Confirm live 2B/2B pricing directly on the leasing flow, normalize any free-rent offer, and verify Lawrence Caltrain walkability before shortlisting.

intake.Promo Raw: 2-Weeks free on unit 115; 1-Month free on all other units. Restrictions apply.
intake.Review Summary: Residents praise spacious 2B/2B layouts and responsive maintenance, but repeated complaints mention package theft, break-ins, and inconsistent security follow-through.
intake.Notes: Transit timing is inferred from the 2.1-mile commuter-rail distance cited by Apartments.com. Official site verifies the floorplan, price, address, and concession.

intake.Address: 777 W. Middlefield Rd, Mountain View, CA 94043
intake.Promo Raw: Up to 8 Weeks Free Base Rent. Minimum lease term applies.
intake.Review Summary: Early residents praise the brand-new amenities and service, but the review base is still small and includes at least one complaint about dismissive maintenance handling.
intake.Notes: Official pages conflict on Caltrain access: the amenities page markets Mountain View Caltrain as a 15-minute walk, while the transportation page lists Mountain View Station at 1.5 miles and 5 minutes by drive.

intake.Promo Raw: 4 WEEKS FREE. Limited time offer on all homes for immediate move-ins.
intake.Review Source: Google via Chamber of Commerce mirror
intake.Review Summary: Amenity and layout feedback is strong, but recurring negative themes include package theft, elevator outages, WhiteSky internet issues, parking scarcity, and management responsiveness.
intake.Notes: The official leasing site uses 100 Aspen Way. Older directories and the PDF still reference 2580-2590 California St for the same community.

intake.Address: 963 E El Camino Real, Sunnyvale, CA 94087
intake.Promo Raw: Receive up to one month free. Ask about the 30-Day Move-In Satisfaction Guarantee and Renter's Assurance Programs.
intake.Review Summary: Many residents praise maintenance quality and a quiet community feel, while negative reviews repeatedly cite lease-management issues, price increases, and weaker value relative to amenities.
intake.Notes: The official leasing pages confirm one- and two-bedroom inventory but did not expose live 2B pricing in the crawled page. The listed rent comes from a third-party listing and should be confirmed directly with the leasing flow.
